_comment: POST this to /api/runs against the AKS-hosted agentevals to score a trace asynchronously and have the http_webhook sink fire on phase=final and phase=error. Replace TRACE_PLACEHOLDER with an OTLP-JSON trace exported from /api/streaming/get-trace (see demo.md step 6). Replace WEBHOOK_URL with your receiver. Slack's native Incoming Webhook expects {text: '...'} so the raw envelope below won't render as a Slack message verbatim — point at webhook.site or a small transform shim to see the real payloads first.

eval_set._: paste the contents of eval_set.json here, or reference via target.kind=http
